generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T LIPPSPRINGE. The mineral spring in Lippspringe, in Westphalia. ANALYSIS BY STOCKHARDT (16 OUNCES). grains Sodium sulphate, Sodium chloride, Calcium sulphate, Calcium carbonate, Magnesium chloride, Magnesium carbonate, Ferrum carbonate, Silica, 6.5080 0.2503 6.3144 3.1995 1.7802 0.2588 0.1133 0.0445 Solid constituents, 18.4640 Gases in 100 Cubic Centimetres of Water. c.c. Carbonic acid, Nitrogen, Oxygen, 16.17 4.40 0.55 Gases freely evolving from 100 parts of Water. parts. Nitrogen, Carbonic acid, Oxygen, 82.44 14.90 2.66 Authorities. 1 , Dr. Bolle, A. H. Z., 45, 289, effects of bathing and drinking the waters and inhaling the gases, 2 , same, a woman 48 years old; 3 , same, a girl 16 years old; 4 , same, a woman; 5 , same, A. H. Z., 54, 113, a man; 6 , same, a man; 7 , Dr. Schroeter, A. H. Z., 57, 53, effects on self; 8 , effects on wife. MIND. ► Emotional. ► Great depression of spirits, with sadness and apprehensiveness (after twenty-four days), [7] . ► Feeling of great apprehension, while riding in a carriage; a kind of anxiety in the heart, as of impending misfortune, together with a kind of homesickness (third day), [7] . ► Ill-humored (tenth day), [7] . ► Very irritable, for three weeks (after forty-seven days), [7] . ► Intellectual. ► Desire to write and busy himself intellectually (twelfth day), [7] . ► Great desire to write (fifteenth day), [7] . HEAD. ► Vertigo. ► Vertigo, while walking (thirty-five days), [17] . ► Vertigo, heaviness of the head, and sleepiness, in the forenoon; after eating he was obliged to sleep an hour (fourteenth day), [7] . ► Violent whirling vertigo, [3] . [10.] ► Dizziness while walking, was obliged to stop (fifty-second day), [7] . ► Dizziness of the head, with confusion, weak memory, and forgetfulness, and difficult comprehension for several days (thirteenth day), [7] . ► Feeling of intoxication in the head, towards evening (eight day), [7] . ► General Head. ► Headache over the whole head, [3] . ► Headache, with drawing in the nape of the neck, lasting three to four hours, coming on suddenly, [1] . ► Forehead. ► Pressive pain in the forehead, [3] . ► Vertex. ► Drawing-sticking in the right side of the vertex (thirteenth day), [8] . ► Stitches in the vertex and right ear (twenty-first day), [8] . ► Sides. ► Feeling of heaviness in the sides of the head, [1] . EYE. ► Redness of the white of the eye, with slight pressure in the eyeball, and lachrymation; disappears after twelve or fifteen hours, [1] . [20.] ► Flickering before the eyes, [1] ; (forty-first day), [7] . ► Flickering before the eyes, so that he cannot see distinctly (thirty-first day), [7] . ► Flickering before the eyes like a bright flaming star, preventing distinct vision, especially while reading in a recumbent position (thirty-third day), [7] . EAR. ► Violent itching in both ears (seventeenth day), [8] . ► Violent itching in the ears and nose (forty-sixth day), [7] , [8] . ► Roaring in both ears, [2] . NOSE. ► Violent sneezing, in the evening (thirty-ninth day), [7] . ► Itching of the nose and anus (fifty-sixth day), [7] . ► Great itching in the nose (forty-third day), [8] . ► Violent itching in the nose, so that it seems as though she would rub it off (eighteenth day), [8] . FACE. [30.] ► Expression suffering; face yellowish-white and sickly-looking (forty-seventh day), [7] . MOUTH. ► Sensitiveness of the teeth (twenty-eighth day), [7] . ► Teeth sensitive to cold water (fifty-second day), [7] . ► Toothache in two lower molars which are filled with gutta percha, first a sticking, and then a drawing-grumbling pain, when he bites the teeth together; they pain as if they would be raised from their sockets, and as if an ulcer would from, aggravated by cold water (twenty-fifth day), [7] . ► Bitter taste in the morning, for several days (after twenty-three days), [7] . THROAT. ► Great hawking of mucus after inhaling the gas (sixth day), [7] . ► Throat seems covered with mucus which she cannot raise (eighteenth day, [8] . ► Dryness of the throat, in the morning (ninth day), [7] , [8] . ► Dryness of the throat in the evening, was obliged to drink, which, however, did not relieve the dryness; afterwards relieved by holding sugar in the mouth (eighth day), [7] . ► Great dryness of the throat during the inhalation of the gas (eighth day, [7] . [40.] ► Pain in the throat, a dryness and sensitiveness, as if it would become inflamed, with constant need of empty swallowing (thirty-third day), [7] . ► Sore throat, so that she could scarcely speak or swallow (twenty-first day), [8] . ► While inhaling the gases, roughness and scraping in the throat, oppression of the chest, palpitation, warmth in the face and afterwards in the whole body, with slight perspiration; was frequently obliged to take a deep breath (thirteenth day), [7] . ► Crawling in the throat at night, obliging him to raise mucus, which woke him; only relieved after raising mucus (fifth day), [7] . STOMACH. ► Appetite. ► Increased appetite, [1] . ► Eructation. ► Eructations, [2] . ► Eructations as soon as she goes into the bath, [1] . ► Empty eructations (forty-second day), [8] . ► Eructations tasting of the gas of the spring, [1] . ► Nausea and Vomiting. ► (Nausea, after drinking the water), [1] . [50.] ► Inclination to vomit, in the afternoon (twenty-fifth day), [7] . ► Inclination to vomit, with retching without vomiting, in the morning (thirty-fifth day), [7] . ► Retching and vomiting of mucus, in the morning (thirty-ninth day), [7] . ► Vomiting of sour water, with paroxysmal colic, [1] . ► Stomach. ► The stomach feels as if it had been disordered by sour grapes; was attacked with sour vomiting, with much mucus, chilliness, and loss of appetite (thirty-first day), [7] . ► Burning in the stomach, with frequent eructations, [3] . ► A pressive compressive cramp in the stomach, especially when lying on the back, two hours after dinner, without any apparent cause; gradually disappearing when he lay on the side (thirty-third day), [7] . ► Pressure beneath the epigastric region, an hour after eating (thirty-seventh day), [7] . ABDOMEN. ► Hypochondria. ► Prickling in the left hypochondrium, [2] . ► Painful sensation in the hepatic region, [3] . [60.] ► Sticking pains in the hepatic region, not lasting a long time, suddenly disappearing, [1] . ► General Abdomen. ► Distension of the abdomen, loud rumbling of gas, in the afternoon (twelfth day), [7] . ► Rumbling in the abdomen, and emission of much offensive flatus , [1] . ► Loud rumbling of gas in the abdomen (after fourteen days), [7] . ► Much emission of flatus, for many days, [8] . ► Loud emission of flatus woke him at night (sixth day), [7] . ► Much flatus with the stool; some bloody mucus, and some masses of fæces as large as Madeira nuts; with great inactivity of the rectum, and colic (after fourteen days), [7] . ► Fulness in the abdomen, [1] . ► Feeling as though the waist were fully one-half smaller, "as if shrunk together," as if the abdomen were constricted to one-third its circumference, [1] . ► Griping, in the evening, as if a stool would follow (eighteenth day), [7] . [70.] ► Griping pain, as if a stool would follow; soon (second day), [7] . ► Griping colic, after rising (sixth day), [7] . ► Colic, with two soft stools (seventeenth day), [8] . ► Colic in the morning, with four pasty stools during the day (fourteenth day), [8] . ► Violent paroxysmal colic, lasting six to eight hours, then suddenly disappearing, immediately followed by great appetite, [1] . ► Hypogastrium. ► Pressive pain in the lower abdomen, [3] . ► Periodic pressive pain in the lower abdomen, [3] . RECTUM AND ANUS. ► Objective. ► Protrusion of the rectum, after lying down (fifth day), [7] . ► Hæmorrhoids, with burning-sticking pains during the hard stools; for almost fourteen days he daily lost a considerable quantity of blood with the stools, [1] . ► The power of urging seems to be wanting at stool, [1] . ► Subjective. [80.] ► Sensation in the rectum as if blood would pass, while sitting (which, however, was not the case), (thirteenth day), [7] . ► A working and burrowing in the rectum (sixth day), [7] . ► Burning and sticking in the anus, with small soft swellings noticed during the stool, [1] . ► Pressing-out of the rectum (eighth day), [7] . ► Itching in the rectum (seventh and eighth days), [8] . ► Itching in the anus (fifteenth day), [8] . ► Itching in the anus, frequently recurring, [4] . ► Itching in the anus obliging scratching (forty-first day), [7] . ► Unpleasant itching in the rectum (ninth day), [7] , [8] . ► Very violent itching in the anus, obliging rubbing (sixteenth day), [8] . [90.] ► Ineffectual urging to stool in the morning, with passage of only some flatus and dark blood in small clots (thirteenth day), [7] . ► Frequent ineffectual desire for stool, with diarrha, [4] . STOOL. ► Diarrha. ► Diarrha, with great colic at night (thirty-eighth day); on the next night two attacks of diarrha with much colic, and during the day four stools with rumbling and colic, stools like brown water (thirty-ninth day); on the next night, two attacks of diarrha with colic, with four watery stools and colic during the day (fortieth day), [8] . ► Several pasty stools in one day (thirteenth day), [8] . ► Four pasty stools, the two last with colic (eighth day), [8] . ► Urging to stool in the morning after rising, followed by emission of much flatus and a few pieces of light-yellow fæces, then some of a brown color, all of the size of hazel-nuts; three hours later, a very brown consistent stools; at 4 P.M. the third stool, at which he was obliged to strain, so that the limbs trembled and he broke into anxious perspiration, so that water could be wrung from his shirt; at first passage of some blood followed by brown fæces, with considerable blood that was more watery than usual, followed by more stool with great urging; on retracting the rectum, he again broke into a perspiration so profuse that he was obliged to change his shirt (fifteenth day), [7] . ► Urging to stool in the morning after rising; evacuation only with great pressure, consisting only of flatus and some dark blood; two hours later, a third stool after great pressure and straining, so that he broke into profuse sweat, with evacuation of pasty masses of the size of hazel-nuts, with transparent stringy mucus, like the white of an egg, which protruded from the anus and could be only gradually removed, followed by discharge of mucus mixed with blood; during the stool burning in the rectum; this was followed by exhaustion, so that he was obliged to lie down in bed, with throbbing and disagreeable pressure in the anus, and a pressing out and weak sensation in the small of the back; an hour after dinner, urging to stool, with great pressure but no stool, only flatus and considerable thin blood with a few clots, also with perspiration, so that he was obliged to change his shirt; with all these, he was very weak; on the next morning, stool consisting of only dark thin blood, at last with a few clots, though less than on the previous day; therewith also the shirt was soaked with sweat; two hours later a stool without blood, with only clear albuminous mucus, the last of which was streaked with blood, and the shirt was again soaked with sweat; two hours after dinner, desire for stool with discharge of dark blood (a quart), followed by great weakness and some perspiration; on the next morning, passage of only dark blood (sixteenth to eighteenth days), [7] . ► Violent urging to stool during the forenoon; two hours after dinner, when he could no longer suppress the stool, fecal mass as large as hazel-nuts, with thin black blood (about a quart), which flowed without exertion, together with perspiration; during the stool, the prolapsus of the rectum, which usually could not be reduced, was to-day easily reduced (eighteenth day); on the next morning discharge of three spoonfuls of black blood with the stool, and during the day more stools with a tablespoonful of blood (nineteenth day); the next morning, a stool with discharge of blood, followed by another after three hours, the stool seemed softer and more satisfactory; two hours after dinner, another stool with a pint of blood, followed after three hours by another with more blood, and at 11.30 P.M. another, with a large quantity of blood without fæces; on pressing at stool, the blood spurted out as from a syringe (twentieth day); on the next morning, some blood with the stool very early and also about 9 o'clock; again in the evening, a stool with blood (twenty-first day); the next day, a stool with spurting of much blood; again in the evening a stool with much blood (twenty-second day); the next morning two or three stools, always with blood (twenty-third day); after which there was a daily stool with discharge of blood, for more than a week, [7] . ► Stool with some blood, followed by frothy saliva like mucus (thirty-fourth day); urging to stool with much, pressure; discharge of a consistent stool without blood, with only mucus; five hours later, again desire for stool, with discharge of watery blood, and some tenacious black clots, difficult to expel from the anus; in the afternoon, three hours after dinner, again desire for stool, and a scanty stool consisting of watery blood (thirty-fifth day); in the morning, a scanty stool with some white mucus and a few drops of blood; in the afternoon a desire for stool which was repressed (thirty-sixth day); in the morning a stool with mucus (thirty-seventh day); in the morning a stool with mucus (thirty-eighth day), [7] . ► Stools continued to be followed by mucus and often blood, sometimes thin, sometimes clotted, for a long time (after forty-one days), [7] . ► A few soft pasty stools with frequent desire; if the stool was held back the desire disappeared (fifth day), [8] . [100.] ► A very profuse pasty stool, followed by a second without pain (fifteenth day), [8] . ► Soft light-brown stool in the morning, with yellowish mucus (seventh day), [8] . ► Great urging at stool, with the passage of only flatus and some mucus; the stool consisted of scanty, soft, fecal masses like sheep-dung (sixth day), [7] . ► Stool in the morning like sheep-dung, with some blood (ninth day), [7] . ► Very yellow stools, as in little children (forty-second day), [8] . ► Stools bloody (observed in a patient who suffered from hæmoptysis, which disappeared after the occurrence of the bloody stools), [1] . ► A few drops of black blood during the stool (eighth day), [7] . ► Constipation. ► Constipation, [3] . ► Constipation; stool hard, difficult , [1] . URINARY ORGANS. ► Urethra. ► Slight mucous discharge from the orifice of the urethra, [1] . [110.] ► Burning cutting while urinating (twelfth day), [7] . ► Micturition. ► Great urging to urinate, immediately on rising from bed; was obliged to urinate immediately, otherwise the urine passed involuntarily (sixth day), [7] . ► He awoke every hour with a desire to urinate; micturition was painful and accomplished only with great pressure, and in jets (thirty-first day), [7] . ► Frequently obliged to rise at night to urinate (thirty-sixth night), [7] . ► Frequently obliged to urinate at night; is always obliged to make great exertion before the urine is pressed out (forty-second day), [7] . ► Frequent micturition; the urine smells like violets, or as if one had eaten asparagus (fifth day), [7] . ► Frequent profuse micturition (sixth day), [7] . ► Very frequent and increased micturition, with sudden desire, which could not be restrained, or only for a short time , [1] . ► Very frequent micturition, with scanty urine (twelfth day), [7] . ► Urinates three times at night (thirty-fifth night), [7] . [120.] ► Urinates four times at night, very copiously (fortieth and forty-first days), [7] . ► Interrupted stream at night, while urinating, with spurting of the urine on pressing (eighth day), [7] . ► Frequently interrupted stream while urinating at night; was always obliged to make great pressure to urinate (seventh day), [7] . ► Scattering of the stream while urinating (twelfth day), [7] . ► Passage of small calculi through the urethra; during eight days he passed some two or three ounces of these stones, [6] . ► Urine. ► Increased secretion of urine, [2] , [3] . ► Urine clear, watery, [1] . SEXUAL ORGANS. ► Male. ► Smegma preputii increased, thin, [1] . ► Emission two nights in succession, in one who had never suffered from them before, [1] . ► Two emissions in one night; the first time with dreams and erections, the second time without either, [1] . ► Female. [130.] ► Increased mucous discharge from the vagina; two days afterwards, there was noticed some bloody streaks in the mucus, [1] . ► Leucorrha, with itching in the rectum (twelfth day), [8] . ► Acrid leucorrha, with a feeling of soreness on the margins of the labia majora, especially when walking, painful from rubbing (twelfth day), [8] . ► Menstruation three days earlier than usual, and more profuse (for the second time), [8] . ► Menstruation two days earlier, and more profuse than usual, [8] . RESPIRATORY ORGANS. ► Larynx and Trachea. ► Tickling in the larynx woke him from the afternoon nap, and lasted till he raised some tenacious mucus (sixth day), [7] . ► Feeling of rawness and dryness in the trachea, with cough, scanty tenacious mucous expectoration and fever; in a girl, [1] . ► Prickling in the trachea, with dry fatiguing cough towards evening (forty-third day), [8] . ► Prickling in the trachea, behind the manubrium sterni; and short attacks of cough without expectoration, [1] . ► Voice. ► Hoarseness, roughness in the throat, and a feeling as though the whole trachea were covered with a glutinous dry substance; better while riding in a carriage; in the afternoon (tenth day), [7] . ► Cough and Expectoration. [140.] ► Dry cough (thirty-fourth day), [8] . ► Dry cough, in the morning, with tickling in the throat, especially when talking (ninth day), [8] . ► Dry fatiguing cough, with dryness of the throat (after twenty-one days), [8] . ► Dry tickling cough in the larynx, lasting until he raises some mucus (after inhalation of the gases), (ninth day), [7] . ► Cough with offensive expectoration, [1] . ► Violent catarrhal cough with easy expectoration of enormous quantity of watery, glassy, tenacious mucus, [5] . ► Coughed out a small piece of mucus, after the first stool in the morning, followed by retching, and at last actual vomiting of tasteless mucus drawn out in strings (fifteenth day), [7] . ► Hæmoptysis; blood thin, bright red, occurring nearly every morning after rising; after drinking the water and inhaling the gases the previous evening, [1] . CHEST. ► Violent anxiety in the chest (in the bath), [1] . ► Feeling of fulness in the chest, immediately after taking the water and breathing the gases, often lasting three or four hours, [1] . [150.] ► Sensation as if the lungs and chest were compressed (in the bath), [1] . ► Pressure and heaviness on the chest while walking rapidly (thirty-sixth day), [7] . ► Pressure and oppression in the chest while walking rapidly (thirty-fifth day), [7] . ► Pressure on the chest, and drawing pains in the right side of the neck, extending down to above the shoulder, on rising from stooping (thirty-fifth day), [8] . ► Great pressure on the chest, with violent pressure while walking, especially if he carried anything in the hand (forty-eighth day), [7] . ► Heaviness and pressure on the chest after smoking (fifty-first day), [7] . ► Heaviness and pressure on the chest while walking (forty-first day), [7] . ► Heaviness, pressure, and fulness in the chest, with vertigo, while walking (fifty-seventh day), [7] . ► Great heaviness and pressure on the chest (forty-fourth day), [7] . ► Great heaviness and pressure on the chest, while walking; was frequently obliged to stop and rest (forty-seventh day), [7] . [160.] ► Great heaviness and pressure in the chest, after coition (forty-eighth day), [7] . ► Oppression of the chest, [5] . ► Oppression of the chest, with frequent inclination or need for taking a deep breath, [1] . ► Stitches in the chest, beneath the third and fourth ribs, [1] . ► Front. ► Fulness of the chest beneath the sternum, as if the chest would burst, especially after smoking or walking a few steps, so that he was obliged to stop and take a deep breath, also ascending steps was very difficult; lasting for a long time after the proving, [7] . ► Pressure on the sternum (forty-fifth day), [7] . ► Pressing at stool causes pressure and a feeling of fulness beneath the sternum, which is also caused by rapid walking or other physical exertion (after thirty-third day), [7] . ► Pressure and fulness beneath the sternum, as if the chest would burst, especially on walking, or other physical exertion; if he wished to walk rapidly he was obliged to remain standing awhile to rest, to take breath a few times before he continued to walk (twenty-sixth day), [7] . ► Frequent sticking pain through the chest, starting from the sternum and extending to the spine (after twenty-one days), [8] . ► Bruised sensation in the left half of the sternum, when talking, causing cough (eighth day), [8] . ► Sides. [170.] ► Stitches in the left side of the chest preventing deep inspiration, especially while sitting, between the seventh and eighth ribs, relieved by motion, like incarcerated flatulence; ceasing after the discharge of blood from the anus (seventeenth day), [7] . ► Fine, suddenly piercing, transient stitches in both sides of the chest, about a hand's breath externally and above the nipples, [1] . ► Mammæ. ► Stitches in the mamma (forty-third day), [8] . HEART AND PULSE. ► Violent palpitation every evening (in a healthy woman), becoming so violent that she was obliged to stop drinking the water; she had never suffered from it before, [1] . ► Pulse increased from 88 to 94 (in six minutes while in the bath); pulse 74 (twenty-eight minutes after the bath), [1] . ► Increased rapidity of the pulse while in the bath, once increased from 72 to 78, at another time from 74 to 88, at another from 72 to 86, [1] . ► Pulse 65 (before the bath); 73 and intermitting three times in 73 beats (after three minutes in the bath), (in a man), [1] . ► Pulse 94, with palpitation (before the bath); 80, without palpitation (after twenty minutes in the bath), (in a woman), [1] . ► Pulse 98 (before the bath), 96 (after twenty minutes, in the bath); 84 (half an hour after the bath), (in a boy of seven years), [1] . BACK. ► Bruised sensation between the shoulders (thirty-third day), [7] . [180.] ► Pain in the lumbar region, with pressure and tension, waking him several times at night, especially when lying on the left side (twenty-third day), [7] . ► A drawing tensive pain in the right lumbar region, while lying on the right side, with the right leg outstretched and the left leg flexed, so that he was obliged to change his position; the pain disappeared on bending the right leg at the knee (thirty-second day), [7] . ► Pain in the small of the back, associated with griping in the abdomen, [2] . EXTREMITIES IN GENERAL. ► Jerking in the limbs continued for a long time after the proving, [7] . ► Great weariness of the limbs, as after a long walk (after fourteen days), [7] . ► Weakness in the limbs, [1] . ► Uneasiness of the limbs, while sitting and lying, in spite of a long walk (thirty-seventh day), [7] . ► Uneasiness and jerking in the limbs, in the evening (thirty-eighth day), [7] . SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Paralytic pain in the whole right arm (thirty-eighth day), [7] . ► Drawing in the right arm with a paralytic sensation extending to the hand, also in the left foot, especially on the back of the foot; the paralytic pain on the outer surface of the right arm always extends to the hand (thirty-sixth day), [7] . [190.] ► Drawing pains in the right arm (forty-first day), [7] . ► Drawing tearing in the left arm towards evening (sixteenth day), [8] . ► Drawing tearing in the right arm extending down from the shoulder, with a paralytic sensation, worse in the wrist (thirty-seventh day), [7] . ► Hand. ► Great distension of the veins on the backs of the hands, after inhaling the gas (sixth day), [7] , [8] . ► Trembling of the hands while sitting, especially of the right hand, with anxious palpitation and orgasm of blood in the chest (thirteenth day), [7] . ► Fingers. ► The two last fingers of the right hand fell asleep in the evening (fiftieth day), [7] . ► Falling asleep of the three last fingers of the right hand, while knitting, with formication; she was obliged to rub and move them in order to regain their natural mobility (thirteenth day), [8] . ► Formication and falling asleep of the right middle finger (seventh day), [8] . INFERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Jerking in the legs in the evening (forty-second day), [7] . ► Jerking in the legs while sitting in the evening; constantly obliged to change his position in the chair (thirty-fifth day), [7] . [200.] ► Jerking and uneasiness in the leg, in the evening while sitting (thirty-sixth day), [7] . ► Great jerking in the lower extremities, while sitting and standing, almost like chorea (forty-fourth day), [7] . ► Great weariness and prostration in the lower extremities (twelfth day), [7] . ► Suddenly, a transient pain shooting from the knee to the ankle, [2] . ► An acute paralytic-like pain in the anterior part of the upper extremity of the tibia, when walking, noticed on putting the foot forward, [1] . ► Cramp in the left leg, gradually relieved by rubbing, with great uneasiness of the limbs, so that he was constantly obliged to move them, in the evening, preventing sleep (thirty-fourth day), [7] . ► Weariness of the feet after a short walk (thirteenth day), [7] . ► Burning pains in the corns (forty-second day), [8] . GENERAL SYMPTOMS. ► Objective. ► Jerking in the whole body, waking him from the afternoon nap (forty-third day), [7] . ► Jerking through the whole body, especially in the lower extremities, while lying down after dinner (thirty-seventh day), [7] . [210.] ► Weakness (after forty-one days), [7] . ► Great weakness, [5] . ► Very unusual weakness nearly the whole day, [1] . ► Sudden weakness and dizziness, so that he was obliged to steady himself to prevent falling, while walking in the evening (thirty-fourth day), [7] . ► Weak and sleepy; was obliged to sleep an hour after breakfast (ninth day), [7] . ► Weak and sleepy, disinclined to do anything (third day), [7] . ► Weak and sleepy all day; yawning; after eating he slept three hours and was still sleepy; went to bed early and slept all night (fifth day), [7] . ► So weak and weary that he was obliged to lie in bed all day, had no appetite, ate nothing but soup (thirty-second day), [7] . ► Great uneasiness, in the evening while sitting, must change his position (fiftieth day), [7] . ► Great restlessness in the evening, can neither sit nor stand (forty-first day), [7] . [220.] ► Great restlessness of the whole body, especially of the lower extremities; can neither stand nor sit; must constantly change the position, with jerking through the whole body (thirty-ninth day), [7] . ► Subjective. ► A peculiar feeling of comfort after micturition, [1] . SKIN. ► Jaundice, [5] . ► Fine red or pale red discrete eruption as large as flaxseed, not elevated above the surface of the skin, over the whole body, itching violently, while in the bath and for some hours afterwards, and in the evening in bed; on continuing to bathe in and drink the waters there developed larger pemphigus-like vesicles containing water, [1] . ► Eruption on arms, hands, and face, like bee stings, with swellings an inch and a half in diameter, induration, and in the middle a whitish elevation like nettlerash, itching so violently that she could scarcely sleep at night; after scratching she was almost beside herself (after sixty days), [8] . ► Frequent drawings in the calves, on which appeared an eruption the next day, which was palish red and papular, [1] . ► Pimples on the chest and abdomen, with red areolæ, with great itching, so that he was constantly obliged to scratch them, as though he had been bitten by fleas (thirty-seventh day), [7] . ► Small, itching, hard pimples on the back of the right hand (after fourteen days), [7] . ► Prickling sticking in the skin of the whole body (thirty-second day), [7] . ► Prickling sticking in the skin makes him impatient and restless; is constantly obliged to change his position (twenty-eighth day), [7] . SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► Sleepiness. [230.] ► Much yawning while inhaling the gas (fifteenth day), [7] , [8] . ► Sleeplessness , falls asleep at a very unusual time, [1] . ► Sleepiness after dinner; he lay down but could not sleep (thirty-seventh day), [7] . ► Sleepy and weary the whole forenoon; was obliged to take a nap (seventh day), [7] . ► Sleepy early in the evening; obliged to go to bed at 8.30, and soon fell asleep (twelfth day), [7] . ► Sleeplessness. ► Much less sleepy and weary after inhaling the gas (sixth day), [7] . ► Cannot sleep in the evening, and it is difficult to rise in the morning (forty-first and forty-second days), [7] . ► Sleep restless, with many unremembered dreams (ninth day), [8] . ► Frequent waking at night (sixteenth day), [8] . ► Woke at 2 o'clock from dreams of anger; could not sleep again till morning (seventeenth night), [8] . ► Dreams. [240.] ► Unremembered anxious dreams, with frequent waking (fifteenth day), [7] . ► Heavy unremembered dreams the whole night, with frequent disagreeable waking, but soon falling asleep again; on rising in the morning, he was still sleepy and anxious (thirteenth day), [7] . ► Very vivid dreams all night of journeyings by land and water, so that when he awoke he did not know whether it was really a dream or not (thirty-first day), [7] . ► Many dreams, from which she woke, but soon fell asleep again
Clinical: Diarrhœa; Hæmoptysis; Hæmorrhoids; Jaundice; Leucorrhœa; Menorrhagia; Urinary calculi; Urticaria; Worms

Tickling in larynx woke him from afternoon nap and lasted till he raised some mucus. Trachea feels raw and dry. Hoarseness, roughness in throat, while trachea feels as if covered with glutinous, dry substances, afternoon, > riding in carriage. Dry cough, morning, with tickling in throat, talking. Violent catarrhal cough with easy expectoration of enormous quantity of watery, glassy, tenacious mucus. Hæmoptysis; blood thin, bright red, occurring nearly every morning after rising (after drinking the water and inhaling the gases the previous evening). Jerking in limbs, continued long after the pains. Paralytic pain in whole r. arm. Great distension of veins in backs of hands after inhaling the gas. Trembling of hands ( r.) while sitting, with anxious palpitation and orgasm of blood in chest. Suddenly, transient pain shooting from knee to ankles. Acute, paralytic-like pain in front of upper end of tibia, when putting foot forward in walking. Weariness of feet after a short walk. Burning pains in corns. Sudden weakness; dizzy; restless; jerkings through whole body. Peculiar feeling of comfort after micturition.

keynotes.text: Lippspringe is a cold, sulphurated, saline spring, and very gaseous, of saline and piquante taste. "It is used in drink and bath as a refreshing and laxative medication. It is vaunted above all against commencing phthisis complicated with hæmoptysis, when the subjects are plethoric, irritable, and liable to pulmonary congestion" (Constantin James). The homœopathic data are derived partly from provings and partly from observations on patients. The purging effect was very marked, as also the diuretic. The urine was increased in quantity and the urging great; in one case many calculi were found. There was > after micturition in one case─"a peculiar feeling of comfort." "Itching of nose and anus" suggests Lipp. as a worm remedy. Alternation of bloody stools with hæmoptysis occurred in one case. Jerking of the limbs; uneasiness; cramp in calves. Perspiration and diarrhœa were at night. Sneezing, palpitation, cramp and restlessness were evening. Heaviness of chest was after coitus; and by smoking. By walking. > After micturition.

_raw: Compare: Calc. sul., Nat. sul., Mag. mur. Restlessness, Rhus, Zn., Caust. > By micturition, Eug. j., Lith. c. After coitus, K. ca.

mental_emotional.text: Depressed; sad; apprehensive. Apprehension riding in carriage; a kind of anxiety in the heart of impending misfortune with home sickness. Irritable. Great desire to write. Weak memory.

head.text: Vertigo: while walking, compelling to stop; whirling; with heaviness of head and sleepiness; after eating obliged to sleep. Sudden headache, with drawing in nape. Drawing-sticking r. side of vertex.

eyes.text: Redness of white of eye, slight pressure in ball, lachrymation. Flickering before eyes like a bright flaming star, preventing distinct vision, when reading in recumbent position.

ears.text: Violent itching in ears and nose. Roaring in both ears.

nose.text: Itching: of nose and anus; of nose so that it seems she would rub it off.

mouth_throat.text: Teeth sensitive to cold water. Bitter taste, morning. Dryness of throat in evening, obliged to drink, which did not >; afterwards > by holding sugar in mouth. Sore throat so she could scarcely speak or swallow.

stomach_abdomen.text: Increased appetite. Eructations: as soon as she goes into the bath; tastes of the gas of the spring. Retching and vomiting of mucus, morning. Vomiting of sour water, with paroxysmal colic. Stomach feels as if disordered by sour grapes; sour vomiting with much mucus, chilliness, loss of appetite. Pressive cramp in stomach lying on back, after dinner; > lying on side. Sticking pains in liver. Prickling in l. hypochondrium. Distension. Loud rumbling and emission of much offensive flatus. Feels "shrunk together," as if abdomen constricted to one-third. Griping as before stool. Periodic pressive pain in hypogastrium.

stool_rectum.text: Protrusion of rectum after lying down. Piles with burning, sticking pains during the hard stools; lost much blood daily for fourteen days. Very violent itching in anus, obliging rubbing. Four pasty stools. Stools continued to be followed by mucus and often blood, sometimes thin, sometimes clotted, for a long time. Stool in morning like sheep-dung, with some blood. Very yellow stools as in little children. Stools bloody (in patient with hæmoptysis, which disappeared after occurrence of the bloody stools). Constipation, stool hard, difficult.

urinary.text: Slight mucous discharge from orifice. Burning cutting while urinating. Great urging (immediately on rising), unless call instantly obeyed urine passed involuntarily. Frequent urination at night; must make great exertion before urine is pressed out; urine smells of violets. Two or three ounces of small calculi passed in eight days. Increased secretion; urine clear watery.

male.text: Smegma preputii increased, thin. Emissions two nights in succession (in one who had never had them before).

female.text: Increased mucous discharge from vagina; two days later some bloody streaks in the mucus. Leucorrhœa: with itching in rectum; acrid, with soreness on margins of labia majora, from walking, painful on rubbing. Menses three days early and more profuse.

chest_heart.text: Violent anxiety in chest (in the back). Fulness in chest immediately after taking the water and breathing the gases. Heaviness and pressure on chest while walking. Fine suddenly piercing, transient Stitches in both sides of chest about a handsbreadth externally and above the nipples. Stitches in the mamma. Violent palpitation every evening (in a healthy woman), obliged to stop drinking the water. Increased rapidity of pulse.

back.text: Bruised sensation between shoulders. Pain in loins, with pressure and tension, waking him several times in night, lying l. side. Pain in small of back with griping in abdomen.

skin.text: Jaundice. Fine, red, or pale red, discrete eruption size of linseed, smooth, itching violently, while in bath, and in evening in bed; larger pemphigus-like vesicles developed later on continuing the baths. Eruptions on arms, hands, and face like bee-stings with swellings an inch and a half in diameter, like nettle-rash; itched so violently could scarcely Sleep.

sleep.text: Much yawning while inhaling the gas. Sleepy: falls asleep at unusual time; after dinner. Unremembered, anxious dreams with frequent waking. Many dreams of dead people and coffins.

fever_chill.text: Chilliness. Shivering with thirst. Flushes of heat with flickering before eyes. Orgasm of blood, flushes of heat with anxiety; obliged to loosen everything about throat and wrists. Glowing heat of face. Sweats easily. Profuse sweat in morning, obliged to change his shirt. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main.
